pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 32 searches for team 'West Coast'; export_result.sh line 42 validates team creation; verifier.py line 51 checks for team existence
setup_task.sh line 48 explicitly retrieves state ID for code 'CA'; all three CA partners (Golden Gate Software, SoCal Surf Shop, Napa Valley Vineyards) are assigned state_id=ca_id
setup_task.sh line 97: opportunity created with name 'Golden Gate Software Upgrade' assigned to partner 'Golden Gate Software' which has state_id=ca_id (CA)
setup_task.sh line 104: opportunity created with name 'SoCal Surf Shop Franchise' assigned to partner 'SoCal Surf Shop' which has state_id=ca_id (CA)
setup_task.sh line 111: opportunity created with name 'Napa Valley Logistics' assigned to partner 'Napa Valley Vineyards' which has state_id=ca_id (CA)
setup_task.sh line 118: opportunity created with name 'Gotham Trading Platform' assigned to partner 'Gotham Finance' which has state_id=ny_id (NY, New York)
setup_task.sh line 125: opportunity created with name 'Austin Warehouse Automation' assigned to partner 'Lone Star Logistics' which has state_id=tx_id (TX, Texas)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates three California-based sales opportunities: 'Golden Gate Software Upgrade', 'SoCal Surf Shop Franchise', and 'Napa Valley Logistics', each associated with a CA-state partner. Two control opportunities represent non-CA regions: 'Gotham Trading Platform' (New York) and 'Austin Warehouse Automation' (Texas). The agent must create a sales team named 'West Coast' and reassign only the three CA opportunities to this team while leaving non-CA opportunities untouched. All data is synthetically generated via Odoo XML-RPC during task setup.
